SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-19-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:30am
Judge Pro Tem Sharon O'Grady, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. Appellant, Eckhart Beatty, appears in Pro Per; Respondent, Sean McGuire, appears in Pro Per.
Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative.
EXH(R)1 Statute re renter's tenancy rights.
EXH(R)2 Copy of restraining order
EXH(R)3 Papers related to restraining order
EXH(R)4 Copy of 3 day notice
EXH(R)5 Copy of SC judgment #822255
EXH(R)6 Copy of police call transcript (made by Respondent)
EXH(A)A
11:35am
Matter is submitted. New evidence is marked and retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
